zh.Of Poltimore, Devon, Eng: 英國英格蘭戴文波爾莫
zh.Bradley Manor, Highweek, Newton Abbot, D: 英國英格蘭戴文希維可
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bamfield於大約1460年出生在英國戴文波爾莫時，他的父親Walter Bamfield22歲，母親Grace Pudsey13歲。他和Grace Pudsey至少有1個兒子。他在英國英格蘭戴文波爾莫被列為lord of the manor。

zh-hans.Bradley Manor, Highweek, Newton Abbot, D: 英国英格兰戴文希維可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bamfield于大约1460年出生在英国戴文波爾莫时，他的父亲Walter Bamfield22岁，母亲Grace Pudsey13岁。他和Grace Pudsey至少有1个儿子。他在英国英格兰戴文波爾莫被列为lord of the manor。

nameMeanings.name: Bamfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Banfield
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Banville in Calvados, Normandy, France. There has been some confusion between this surname and   Bonfield  . In Ireland this is a variant of   Banville  , the original French form of the placename, and now the usual spelling of the surname in Ireland; it is associated primarily with County Wexford.

English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in England with similar names, such as Bampfylde House in Poltimore, Devon and Bamville Farm in Wheathampstead, Hertfordshire. There may have been some confusion with   Benfield  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bamfield was born about 1460, in Poltimore, Devon, England, his father, Walter Bamfield, was 22 and his mother, Grace Pudsey, was 13. He had at least 1 son with Grace Pudsey. His occupation is listed as lord of the manor in Poltimore, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bamfield est né environ 1460, à Poltimore, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Walter Bamfield, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Grace Pudsey, avait 13 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Grace Pudsey. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord of the manor à Poltimore, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bamfield um 1460 in Poltimore, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Bamfield 22 und seine Mutter Grace Pudsey 13. Er hatte mit Grace Pudsey mindestens 1 Sohn. sein Beruf ist als lord of the manor in Poltimore, Devon, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bamfield è nato il circa 1460 nel Poltimore, Devon, England, il suo padre, Walter Bamfield, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Grace Pudsey, aveva 13 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Grace Pudsey. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord of the manor nel Poltimore, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bamfieldが約1460年にイギリスデボンポルティモーで生まれた時，父Walter Bamfieldは22歳，母Grace Pudseyは13歳であった。彼はGrace Pudseyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。イギリスイギリスデボンポルティモーでの職業はlord of the manorと記録されている。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bamfield(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 데폰 포팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Bamfield(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Grace Pudsey(은)는 13세였다. 그는 Grace Pudsey(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 포팀어에서 lord of the manor이었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bamfield nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Bamfield, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Grace Pudsey, tinha 13 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Grace Pudsey. Sua profissão aparece como lord of the manor em Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bamfield родился около 1460 г. в местности полтимор, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter Bamfield было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Grace Pudsey, 13. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Grace Pudsey.  Он работал по профессии lord of the manor в местности полтимор, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Bamfield nació aproximadamente 1460, en Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter Bamfield, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Grace Pudsey, tenía 13 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Grace Pudsey. Su ocupación registrada era lord of the manor en Poltimore, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
